name: Aurora Wireless Headphones
shortDescription: Over-ear wireless headphones with active noise cancellation.
description: Immerse yourself in rich, balanced sound with the Aurora Wireless Headphones. Featuring active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, plush memory-foam ear cushions, and Bluetooth 5.3 for a stable connection. Perfect for commuting, working, or relaxing at home.

name: Trailblazer Running Shoes
shortDescription: Lightweight running shoes with responsive cushioning.
description: The Trailblazer Running Shoes combine a breathable knit upper with a responsive foam midsole, giving you a light, energetic stride whether you're training for a marathon or taking a morning jog. Durable rubber outsole grips the road and light trails alike.

name: Nimbus Ceramic Coffee Mug Set
shortDescription: Set of 4 handcrafted ceramic mugs, 12oz each.
description: Start your mornings right with the Nimbus Ceramic Coffee Mug Set. Each mug is hand-glazed for a unique matte finish, holds 12oz of your favorite brew, and is microwave and dishwasher safe. Sold as a set of four in soft, neutral tones.

name: Voyager Leather Backpack
shortDescription: Full-grain leather backpack with padded laptop sleeve.
description: The Voyager Leather Backpack is crafted from full-grain leather that ages beautifully with use. It features a padded 15-inch laptop sleeve, multiple interior organizer pockets, and adjustable straps for all-day comfort. A timeless companion for work or travel.

name: Pulse Smart Fitness Watch
shortDescription: Track workouts, heart rate, and sleep in real time.
description: Stay on top of your health with the Pulse Smart Fitness Watch. Continuous heart-rate monitoring, sleep tracking, 20+ workout modes, and a 7-day battery life keep you informed without needing to charge constantly. Water-resistant to 50 meters.

name: Meadow Cotton Throw Blanket
shortDescription: Soft woven cotton blanket, perfect for any season.
description: Wrap yourself in the Meadow Cotton Throw Blanket, woven from 100% breathable cotton for year-round comfort. Its generous 50x60 inch size makes it perfect for the couch, bed, or a picnic in the park. Machine washable and fade-resistant.

name: Horizon Polarized Sunglasses
shortDescription: UV400 polarized lenses with a lightweight frame.
description: Cut glare and protect your eyes with Horizon Polarized Sunglasses. The scratch-resistant polarized lenses block 100% of UVA/UVB rays, while the flexible lightweight frame stays comfortable from sunrise to sunset. Includes a protective hard case.

name: Cascade Stainless Water Bottle
shortDescription: Double-wall insulated bottle keeps drinks cold 24 hours.
description: The Cascade Stainless Water Bottle uses double-wall vacuum insulation to keep beverages cold for up to 24 hours or hot for up to 12. The leak-proof lid and durable powder-coated exterior make it a reliable companion for the gym, office, or trail.

name: Drift Canvas Sneakers
shortDescription: Classic low-top canvas sneakers for everyday wear.
description: The Drift Canvas Sneakers offer timeless style with a breathable canvas upper, cushioned insole, and a durable rubber sole for everyday comfort. Easy to dress up or down, they're a versatile addition to any wardrobe.

name: Zenith Mechanical Keyboard
shortDescription: Tactile mechanical keyboard with RGB backlighting.
description: Type with precision and style using the Zenith Mechanical Keyboard. Hot-swappable tactile switches, per-key RGB backlighting, and a durable aluminum frame make it a favorite among gamers and typists alike. Includes USB-C detachable cable.

name: Solstice Linen Throw Pillow
shortDescription: Woven linen pillow cover with hidden zipper.
description: Add texture and warmth to any room with the Solstice Linen Throw Pillow. The natural woven linen cover features a hidden zipper closure and comes in a versatile neutral tone that complements any decor style. Insert included.

name: Ranger Canvas Messenger Bag
shortDescription: Durable canvas messenger bag with leather trim.
description: The Ranger Canvas Messenger Bag pairs rugged waxed canvas with genuine leather trim for a rugged-yet-refined look. Fits up to a 14-inch laptop, with an adjustable crossbody strap and multiple pockets for everyday essentials.
